name: chatbot-widgets
description: Aparsoft AI Chatbot Widget -- framework wrappers for React, Next.js, Vue, and Angular

scripts.build: echo "No build step required -- packages are thin wrappers."
scripts.test: node -e "['react','nextjs','vue','angular'].forEach(p => { const pkg = require('./packages/' + p + '/package.json'); console.log(pkg.name, pkg.version); })"
